name: Pure Sidr Honey
description: Raw, unfiltered Sidr honey harvested from wild hive colonies in pristine mountain valleys. Rich in antioxidants and enzymes.

name: Premium Desi Ghee
description: Traditional hand-churned ghee made from 100% grass-fed buffalo milk using centuries-old bilona method.

name: Cold-Press Olive Oil
description: Single-estate extra virgin olive oil, cold-pressed within 24 hours of harvest. Zero additives, pure goodness.

name: Wild Berry Honey
description: Floral honey collected from beehives placed near wild berry orchards. Light amber with a fruity finish.

name: Premium Dry Fruits Mix
description: Hand-selected almonds, cashews, walnuts and pistachios sourced from organic certified farms across Pakistan.

name: Black Seed Oil
description: First cold-press Nigella sativa oil — known as 'the cure for everything except death'. Full therapeutic potency.
